extraction.one_line_summary: KUSS Sepp won solo from the breakaway after being given freedom by Jumbo-Visma with Roglic secure, attacking final climb at 17% gradient.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma placed Kuss in break then let him ride for himself, using team leader's GC security to harvest stage win.
Valverde attacked at 7km to go on summit finish, only Roglic could follow, immediately isolating Lopez without teammates.
Astana/Movistar coalition paced at base of final climb trying to pressure Roglic, but inadvertently dropped their own GC leaders.
Kiryienka attacked 6km before final climb solo from chase group, unusual proactive Ineos tactic when likely missing break success.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: domestique showed stage-winning climbing legs when given freedom, caught multiple chasers on 17% gradient despite day-long effort
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: only rider able to follow Roglic when attacking at 7km, gained 40s on other GC contenders at stage 15
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped again from GC group on final climb, explicitly noted as 'far from his best' on brutal mountain stage
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: sat on Lopez wheel throughout final climb despite racing for young rider classification, passive tactics against direct rival
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: isolated by Valverde attack with Fuglsang unable to pace, lost 40s despite having Astana teammate present
